name: koishi-plugin-emoji-intents
description: 意图式表情注入:把 emojiluna 的标签/分类词表(而非逐张 URL 清单)注入 chatluna,模型挑意图、服务器随机选图;token 随标签数封顶,不随图片数增长
author: 妖祀

description.zh: 意图式表情注入:注入标签/分类词表,模型挑意图、服务器随机选图,经 {emoji_intents} 注入
description.en: Intent-based sticker injection: inject emojiluna's tag/category vocabulary into chatluna so the model picks an intent and the server randomly serves a matching sticker; token cost scales with tag count, not image count, via {emoji_intents}.
